log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kobold — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Kobold — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Kobold — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Kobold — Armored Tank.
